This test verifies cooldown attachment at the manager workflow level. Exercising the full 429→cooldown-reporting path from the adapter would require adding a mock adapter that returns 429, which is out of scope for this PR's focus on manager-level cooldown tracking. The current approach correctly verifies that the manager stores cooldown against the right profile.
